name: python3-fs
title: python3-fs
description:
Python filesystem abstraction
Pyfilesystem is a Python module that provides a common interface to many types
of filesystem, and provides some powerful features such as exposing
filesystems over an internet connection, or to the native filesystem.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fs because Python filesystem abstraction.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
